raw_payload.subject: Introduction
raw_payload.body:
Hi Sam,

A partner suggested I should get connected with IFG. I work with several founder-owned services companies and thought it could be useful for us to compare notes sometime.

Open to connecting next week?

Best,
Priya
raw_payload.thread_summary: First-touch email from a CEPA advisor. No client, transaction, or specific reason for the meeting is provided.
